video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic wide shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Moonvale, an androgynous ranger with a green half-cape and leaf-shaped brooch, steadies a dented shield on a workbench. Beside her, Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak, carefully guides a safe repair tool along the shield's edge. Cooperative hands, soft forge light, steady focus, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positioning. Yuna Silverbrook gently taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Moonvale maintains a firm, steady grip on the shield's handle. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focusing on tool-based repair work in a fantasy setting. No sexual or inappropriate content.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is overwhelmed with post-raid gear repairs, and the ranger helps the coordinator stabilize the workflow.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Shared labor in the forge builds professional rapport.
Valued assistance during a high-pressure gear backlog.
